lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Augh! Your sins! They BLIND me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for the Sin Seer.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Are you another one of those 'holier than thou' fools wanting to redeem themselves?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, no actually, I'm trying to join a really evil guy's team.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Really? Finally, something worthwhile.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: It was fun messing with those devotees the first few times but, after a while, condemning people to an eternity of damnation gets a bit dull.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: So, whom are you trying to hook up with? Dark priest? Warlord? Penguin?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, I want to prove to General Khazard I'm trustworthy.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Oh, that old fart? Is he still around? Humph. I dunno if I can be bothered.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I pay you for the trouble - would you then? I can't imagine you make much money, seeing people's sins and all.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Oh, there's money in it. I just don't get invited to many parties.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: You got me all excited about evil plots, and now it's just a matter of trust. I really can't be bothered to strain myself on that account.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine, you don't actually have to see my sins, just pronounce me to be trustworthy. I'll pay you and be on my way.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: He'll know it's a lie. But I do need the cash, so I'll do it. Gimme 40 gold coins and you'll be as trustworthy as a newborn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here's the money.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Fine. I declare you trustworthy, if you consider bribing a seer a trustworthy transaction.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Give this note to Khazard, it will prove you have been to see me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: PLEASE! I want to know what he's up to.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Ooooh, you're going to learn of his plans and stab him in the back?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Absolutely.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Fine, give me 40 gold coins and I'll take a look at your sins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here's the money.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: You have done many great deeds...but many terrible deeds. Sometimes you do them by accident, but are still sins. No, I would not trust you to walk my dog.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Give this note to Khazard, it will prove you have been to see me.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Whatcha lookin' at chicken legs? Don't you have a General you should speak to?

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: You already have one. Get on with you!

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Here ya go. Take more care of it this time.
